_meta.layer: Trade Decision Stack v0 Step 4A — human_review_queue (daily review workflow; status only, no size)
_meta.all_numbers: [unvalidated intuition]; ordering is the shipped status precedence, NOT a calibrated priority
_meta.note: The four buckets PARTITION the candidate board — every name lands in exactly one, nothing dropped. candidate_review is a discussion/reference list, NOT a buy and NOT a position.

review_required.what_to_check: confirm the risk block (e.g. an [unvalidated] concentration cap) and decide
